posts.hook: Kids are getting myopia at double the rate of 20 years ago. This is why.
posts.caption:
Kids are getting myopia at DOUBLE the rate of 20 years ago.

The culprit? Screens before age 6, less outdoor time, and near-focus overload.

Parents — check your kid's vision. Free Snellen test takes 2 minutes.

posts.hook: Why your child's screen time is reshaping their eyeballs. Literally.
posts.caption:
Extended near-focus during childhood physically elongates the eyeball. That's what causes myopia.

It's not reversible. But you can slow it.

- More outdoor time (2+ hours/day)
- Screen breaks every 20 minutes
- Regular vision checks

Free Snellen test for kids at axeo.vision/test

#Myopia #KidsVision #Axeo #EyeHealth #ParentingTips

posts.hook: The WHO predicts 50% of the world will be myopic by 2050.
posts.caption:
The WHO predicts half the world will be myopic by 2050.

The biggest driver? Childhood screen time and reduced outdoor exposure.

Every parent should baseline their kid's vision. Takes 2 minutes.

Free Snellen test: axeo.vision/test

posts.hook: We built a free vision testing platform. Here's why we made it free.
posts.caption:
We built a free vision testing platform at axeo.vision.

Snellen acuity + Ishihara color vision. No download, no signup, results in 2 minutes.

Why free?

Because 2.2 billion people have a vision impairment globally, and half could have been prevented or addressed earlier. Access to basic screening shouldn't require a copay.

Axeo's core product is a training platform — 17 exercises, 6 tests, 3 structured programs for $2.92/mo.

But the entry point should always be free.

If you're building health products: lead with value, not paywalls.
